named-query.name: Users.findByIamId
named-query.query: SELECT users FROM Users users WHERE users.iamId = :iamId

named-native-query.name: LinkResource.findMenusForInternalUser
named-native-query.query: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT linkResource.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CASE WHEN linkResource.label_key = 'icd_link_card_order_desc' AND linkResource.link_uri_addr = '/cardorder/init' THEN 'CARD_ORDER' ELSE linkResource.rsrc_id END ORDER BY linkResource.level_0_sort_nbr ) AS rowNumber FROM dbo.link_resource linkResource LEFT JOIN cxxcow.users_resources usersResources ON usersResources.rsrc_id = linkResource.rsrc_id AND usersResources.user_id = :userId WHERE linkResource.level_0_sort_nbr > 0 AND linkResource.level_1_desc IS NOT NULL AND linkResource.level_1_desc <> '' ) linkResourceDeduped WHERE rowNumber = 1 ORDER BY menu_flag DESC, level_0_sort_nbr, level_1_sort_nbr, level_2_sort_nbr
